name: node-fast-deep-equal
title: node-fast-deep-equal
summary:
Fast Deep Equal
Features
- ES5 compatible
- works in node.js (0.10+) and browsers (IE9+)
- checks equality of Date and RegExp objects by value.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
